mapper.sql: h.id, h.delivery_no, TO_CHAR(h.delivery_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS delivery_date, TO_CHAR(h.actual_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS actual_date, h.order_no, h.customer_cd, h.site_cd, h.transaction_type, h.special_notes, h.delivery_address, h.vehicle_no, h.driver_nm, h.driver_phone, h.shipping_company, h.shipping_cost, h.shipping_tax, h.delivery_status, h.remarks, COALESCE(d.cnt, 0) AS detail_count, COALESCE(d.total_amt, 0) AS total_amount
LEFT JOIN ( SELECT delivery_no, COUNT(*) AS cnt, SUM(total_amount) AS total_amt FROM hkgn.delivery_detail GROUP BY delivery_no ) d ON d.delivery_no = h.delivery_no
mapper.select:
SELECT FROM hkgn.delivery_header h
ORDER BY h.delivery_date DESC, h.delivery_no DESC

SELECT FROM hkgn.delivery_header h
WHERE 1=1
AND h.delivery_status = #{status}
AND ( h.delivery_no ILIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR h.order_no ILIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR h.customer_cd ILIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR h.site_cd ILIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR h.special_notes ILIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' )
AND h.delivery_date >= TO_DATE(#{dateFrom}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
AND h.delivery_date <= TO_DATE(#{dateTo}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
ORDER BY h.delivery_date DESC, h.delivery_no DESC
